code: import React,{useEffect,useState}from"react";import CartItem from"../components/CartItem";import{getCart}from"../services/api";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function CartPage(){const[items,setItems]=useState([]);useEffect(()=>{async function loadCart(){try{const data=await getCart();const normalizedItems=Array.isArray(data)?data:data.items||[];setItems(normalizedItems);}catch(error){setItems([{id:1,name:"Sample Cart Item",quantity:1,price:29.99}]);}}loadCart();},[]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("section",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{children:"Cart Page"}),items.length===0?/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:"Your cart is currently empty."}):/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"grid",children:items.map(item=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(CartItem,{item:item},item.id||item._id))})]});}export default CartPage;
